phase_0_iter34_ablation.status: COMPLETE 15:34 UTC. 9 variants × 3 seeds × LOOCV done in 4.4 hours wall.
phase_0_iter34_ablation.summary: Item 12 is the load-bearing pillar (45% of total signal). Items 9/10/11/14 are chain-redistributable. Item 13 is an active chain distractor (dropping it IMPROVES T1 by +0.003). Aux items 15+18 are decorative (F68 mechanism null at N=92). K=500 vs no-K=500 is essentially the same. The NLS036 cohort-hygiene effect (-0.0196) is larger than 6 of 9 component ablations.

Pattern observed: drop9/10/11 each ~Δ=-0.010 (chain-redistributable). drop12 (postural stability, per-item CCC=0.565) seed-42 only: Δ=-0.0274 (3x larger — STRUCTURALLY LOAD-BEARING). drop13/14/15/18/no_k500 pending.

cells_addressed.c_cohort_n92_vs_n93: DONE 2026-05-10 (hygiene correction Δ=-0.0196 from NLS036 exclusion)

phase_0_iter34_ablation.feeds_into_slot_design: If aux items {15,18} drop hurts >+0.02 each, T1-C must include them in shared prior. If no_k500 drops >+0.05, K=500 is load-bearing and any selection-rule slot is auto-rejected.

immutable_cohort.filter: PD with valid_updrs_item_total({9..14, 15, 18}); NLS036 excluded per validated loader
immutable_cohort.comment: All slot LOOCV runs must use this exact cohort. SID-list deviation invalidates the lockbox.

dropped_at_design.T1-B_severity_mixup: Codex: weak augmentation, no new measurement info; iter40 wall (self-distillation FAIL Δ=-0.026) is the prior.
dropped_at_design.T3-E_hc_manifold_as_written: Codex: AUTO-REJECT — 'zero-severity HC manifold' uses HC cohort identity as severity semantics. Permissible only as fully-unlabeled PD+HC structural prior, in which case it collapses to Tier-2 preprocessing and is bundled into T3-F.
dropped_at_design.T3-G_external_join: DUA-BLOCKED at authoring (Hssayeni Synapse-blocked; PPMI/Verily/WATCH-PD/ICICLE/CNS/PPP-VME packets pending). Slot stays parked; if DUA opens mid-session, family widens to n=6 with revised Bonferroni = 0.05/6 = 0.0083.

primary_promotion_statistic.name: Per-subject paired sign-flip permutation on squared-error reduction
primary_promotion_statistic.frac_above_zero_status: REPORTED but DESCRIPTIVE — no longer decisive (goal-v1 §PRIMARY)
primary_promotion_statistic.default_prior: NULL given 24 wall data points across 11 architectural probe-strategy classes

five_fold_screen_gate.policy: If 5-fold screen fails, slot does not advance to LOOCV. No selection-leakage. Document the screen failure in findings.md.

tier_1_always_required.fold_local_helpers_only: inductive_lib.FoldImputer / FoldNormalizer / FoldSeverityBins; no global imputers/z-scoring/anchors.
tier_1_always_required.cache_manifests: Every reusable cache_*.csv|.npz must carry a sidecar .manifest.json documenting: script, git_sha, command, created_at_utc, included_sids_hash, labels_used, fold_scope, cohort_statistics_used, normalization_scope, source_artifacts.
tier_1_always_required.external_role_declared: T3-F's HC use is declared role=tier2_unsupervised_harmonization; HC labels never enter fit.

tier_2_label_free_priors_permitted.allowed: PD+HC label-free PCA basis on raw IMU; global scale priors; frequency-band energy normalization constants; unsupervised population covariance.
tier_2_label_free_priors_permitted.guardrails: Manifest must prove zero target leakage. Any structure tied to severity-derived recording selection BANNED. HC labels never used as 'zero severity' proxy.

tier_4_preregistration_discipline.exploration_phase: 5-fold OOF screen may adapt; failures reportable.
tier_4_preregistration_discipline.confirmation_phase: LOOCV requires frozen formula_sha256 (per-slot), immutable cohort (this file), immutable primary stat, exactly one locked evaluation.
tier_4_preregistration_discipline.negative_lockboxed_runs: REPORTABLE and CANNOT be hidden or rerun.

slot_T1_A_severity_rank_contrastive_pret.status: NOT CODED in this session. Deferred to next session if T1-C also fails. Codex+gemini priors: 10-15% probability of clearing detectability. Requires raw-IMU window loader and per-fold encoder pretraining (4+ hours coding + 12+ hours compute).
slot_T1_A_severity_rank_contrastive_pret._original_design: designed; awaiting Phase 0 outcome before script lock
slot_T1_A_severity_rank_contrastive_pret.hypothesis: Severity-rank contrastive pretraining of an IMU-window encoder, then iter34-style chain fit on the frozen encoder's mean-pooled features, yields ΔCCC >= +0.025 vs iter34-corrected at LOOCV.
slot_T1_A_severity_rank_contrastive_pret.mechanism_orthogonality: Pretext is severity-order preservation in latent space (NOT masked recon, NOT classification). Wall: F36-D (K=500 absorbs scalar blocks) — contrastive encoder outputs are NOT a scalar block; they are a learned representation. Codex: weakly orthogonal (frozen encoders × 4 have failed; this is severity-rank not generic SSL).

design.triplet_loss: anchor = window of subject s at time t; positive = same subject s different time t' (intra-subject); negative = different subject s' with |HY(s) - HY(s')| > 1 (H&Y-scaled margin); margin = 0.5 * |HY diff|
design.contrastive_bins: fit train-fold-only via inductive_lib.FoldSeverityBins; pretext frozen BEFORE outcome inspection
design.downstream: frozen encoder mean-pooled over windows -> 128-d feature block -> concatenate with V2 features -> iter34 chain (3-base) feature_select_fold K=500

slot_T1_A_severity_rank_contrastive_pret.pre_5fold_screen: 5-fold OOF: delta vs iter34 must be Δ̄ >= +0.025 with seed std < 0.020 across 3 seeds.
kill_criteria: 5-fold screen Δ̄ < +0.025: KILL, document mechanism failure (likely encoder learned subject-id rather than severity).
5-fold screen Δ̄ >= +0.025 but seed std >= 0.020: KILL (variance), do not promote.
LOOCV p > 0.01 OR BCa CI includes 0 OR point Δ < +0.025: KILL, log as new wall data point.

slot_T1_C_bayesian_per_item_no_aux.status: EXECUTED launch 2026-05-12 12:01 UTC. LOCKBOX RUNNING on slave (CPU-bound JAX SVI; ETA 14:00-15:00 UTC). NEXT-SESSION pickup.
slot_T1_C_bayesian_per_item_no_aux._original_design: designed; awaiting Phase 0 outcome before script lock
slot_T1_C_bayesian_per_item_no_aux.hypothesis: Hierarchical Bayesian per-item regression with shared subject-level H&Y prior, fit ONLY on items {9, 10, 11, 12, 13, 14} (NO aux 15/18), models UPDRS item covariance natively and yields ΔCCC >= +0.025 vs iter34-corrected.
slot_T1_C_bayesian_per_item_no_aux.mechanism_orthogonality: Codex: 'plausible only if NOT iter34 chain regularization in probabilistic clothing.' Therefore aux items {15, 18} are EXCLUDED from the prior structure — otherwise the slot duplicates iter34's auxiliary chain mechanism. The orthogonal claim is partial pooling across items, not partial pooling across tasks. Wall: F70 iter34 hybrid local optimum.

design.library: numpyro (NUTS or SVI), all fitted in fold-local outer training set
design.model: y_si = alpha_s + beta_i * f(x_si) + eps; alpha_s ~ N(theta_hy(s), sigma_a); beta_i shared across items; sigma_a learned
design.features_per_item: iter34's K=500 per-fold-selected features against item i residual (NOT against T1 residual — that's iter34's mechanism). Fresh K=500 per ITEM per fold.
design.no_aux: items 15 and 18 are NOT included in joint posterior — strictly {9, 10, 11, 12, 13, 14}
design.decision_output: MAP estimate of item-wise posterior mean -> sum to T1

slot_T1_C_bayesian_per_item_no_aux.pre_5fold_screen: 5-fold OOF on training cohort: Δ̄ >= +0.025 with seed std < 0.020.
kill_criteria: Bayesian inference does not converge (R-hat > 1.05 on >5% of params): KILL, log convergence failure.
slot_T1_C_bayesian_per_item_no_aux.expected_delta_codex: +0.005 to +0.02 (modal), 20% probability of clearing detectability — most likely outcome is iter34 chain dominates

slot_T1_D_tug_mechanics_restricted.status: designed; awaiting Phase 0 outcome before script lock
slot_T1_D_tug_mechanics_restricted.hypothesis: A tiny preregistered TUG-mechanics feature family (turning, sit-stand, gait-initiation, total-time) on items {7, 8, 10, 12, 14} ONLY, added as a POST-K=500 routed block in the iter34 chain, yields ΔCCC >= +0.025 vs iter34-corrected.
slot_T1_D_tug_mechanics_restricted.mechanism_orthogonality: Codex: 'mostly feature-block tweak' (F36-D class wall). The ONLY differentiator from F36-D is hypothesis restriction: items 7, 8, 10, 12, 14 specifically (per goal-v1 spec), routed post-K=500 to bypass V2 absorption. Wall: F36-D feature-block absorption. Weakly orthogonal.

design.feature_family_size: 5-12 scalars (TUG sit-stand wall-clock, turning angular velocity peak, gait-initiation onset time, total-TUG-time, swing-stance ratio asymmetry)
design.extraction_cache: new cache_tug_mechanics.py (TBD; cohort-local fold-safe via inductive_lib)
design.routing: POST-K=500: chain step k=7,8,10,12,14 sees V2-K500 (500) ⊕ tug_mechanics (5-12); other steps see V2-K500 only
design.items_summed_in_t1: {10, 12, 14} only (the 3 items in T1_SUM_ITEMS that overlap with hypothesis restriction)

slot_T1_D_tug_mechanics_restricted.pre_5fold_screen: 5-fold OOF cheap screen: Δ̄ >= +0.025 with seed std < 0.020.
kill_criteria: 5-fold screen Δ̄ < +0.025: KILL — F36-D wall holds, even with hypothesis restriction.
Cache manifest fails (e.g., depends on TUG protocol timing that leaks subject id): KILL.
slot_T1_D_tug_mechanics_restricted.rationale_for_keeping_despite_codex_low_: Cheapest in compute; validates the master pre-reg pipeline end-to-end (per-subject sign-flip, BCa, 5-null gate); fast feedback on FWER discipline; first slot to run.

slot_T3_F_domain_adversarial_tier2_harmo.status: EXECUTED 2026-05-12 11:43-11:55 UTC. RESULT: FAIL on all three gates. Wall data point 25.

executed_results.verdict: FAIL all three gates (p > 0.0125; BCa excludes 0 in WRONG direction; Δ < +0.025)

slot_T3_F_domain_adversarial_tier2_harmo.mechanism_of_failure: Codex's predicted kill criterion confirmed: site (NLS vs WPD) is CONFOUNDED with severity (WPD has milder PD on average). The adversarial site-invariance objective removes severity-discriminative signal. DANN-only branch indistinguishable from zero in LOOCV and both LOSO directions. LGB-only branch reproduces iter47 exactly (LOOCV 0.3784, LOSO avg 0.150).
slot_T3_F_domain_adversarial_tier2_harmo._original_design: designed; awaiting Phase 0 outcome before script lock
slot_T3_F_domain_adversarial_tier2_harmo.hypothesis: Inductive domain-adversarial Stage-1 (gradient-reversal-layer head predicting cohort/site) bundled with Tier-2 label-free PD+HC spectral harmonization (per-band energy normalization + cohort PCA whitening) yields T3 LOSO CCC >= 0.250 vs iter47 LOSO 0.150 AND T3 LOOCV CCC >= 0.4500 vs iter47 0.3784.
slot_T3_F_domain_adversarial_tier2_harmo.mechanism_orthogonality: Codex: TRULY ORTHOGONAL. Attacks cohort/site nuisance (LOSO failure mode), not feature-space saturation. Wall: F58 (N=300 needed for Δ=+0.02 via convex blends) — that wall is about feature-space saturation, NOT about subject-invariance. Tier-2 unsupervised harmonization is a DIFFERENT lever. Combining them: tier-2 stabilizes the input distribution, DANN explicitly removes site-conditional severity. Independent mechanisms, potentially multiplicative.

design.tier_2_preprocessing: Spectral whitening fit on PD+HC training set raw IMU (NO labels, NO HC=0 semantics). PCA basis on combined IMU features (PD-train ∪ HC), variance >=95%. Manifest will declare cohort_statistics_used=true, labels_used=false, fold_scope=outer_train.
design.adversarial_stage1: GRL head predicting site ∈ {NLS, WPD} on Stage-1 features. Lambda annealed via Ganin schedule. Source: iter5 Stage-1 (H&Y + cv_yrs + cv_sex + cv_dbs) ⊕ tier-2-whitened PCA components.
design.stage2: Gradient boost on adversarially-regularized Stage-1 residuals.
design.loso_eval: Hold out one site (NLS or WPD), train on the other; report LOSO CCC on held-out site.
design.loocv_eval: Same architecture, subject-level LOOCV on N=95 valid-range cohort (matches iter47 cohort, NOT the T1 N=92).

slot_T3_F_domain_adversarial_tier2_harmo.pre_5fold_screen: 5-fold LOSO-stratified screen on T3 target. Promotion gate: Δ̄ >= +0.025 vs iter47 LOSO 0.150.
kill_criteria_codex: If domain predictability drops but CCC doesn't move: invariance is removing severity signal -> KILL F (and E if reopened).
If domain predictability remains high after DANN training: adversarial branch ineffective -> KILL F.
If tier-2 alone (without DANN) does not stabilize T3 LOSO: drop tier-2 from later slots, document.
LOOCV CCC drops below iter47 0.3784 even though LOSO improves: report ONLY LOSO improvement, accept LOOCV null.
slot_T3_F_domain_adversarial_tier2_harmo.expected_delta_codex: T3 LOSO: +0.05 to +0.15 (modal +0.08); T3 LOOCV: +0.00 to +0.05 (modal +0.02). 40% probability LOSO clears +0.10 gate.

execution_order.rationale: T1-D first (cheapest, validates analysis pipeline). Then T3-F (highest-leverage per codex, attacks LOSO subject-invariance — different failure mode from T1 ceiling). Then T1-C and T1-A (low priors, run if budget allows). User authorization: 'optimize for hitting the goal, not for short runtime' — execute all 4 unless 3 consecutive add only wall points.
order: Slot 1: T1-D TUG mechanics (4 hours, validates pipeline + first FWER member)
Slot 2: T3-F domain-adversarial + tier-2 harmonization (36 hours, highest expected impact for goal-v1 criterion 3)
Slot 3: T1-C Bayesian per-item no-aux (12 hours)
Slot 4: T1-A severity-rank contrastive (24 hours, highest compute, lowest prior)
execution_order.between_slots_audit: After each LOOCV lockbox: read codex+gemini+kimi short consult on failure mechanism if NULL; update findings.md with new F-number; update master pre-reg with formula_sha256 if PASS.
execution_order.stopping_rule: Per goal-v1 §ITERATION LOOP 8: STOP when (a) one success criterion lockboxed; OR (b) all 4 slots become wall points; OR (c) 3 consecutive sessions add only wall points (this is session 1).
